prompt:
Replicate this EXACT layout: a single-page editorial Brand Guidelines poster for a Dominican creative embroidery and print studio called 'MEMORAMA'. Vertical 4:5 canvas. Background is a clean, warm cream color (#F7F2E8) with subtle paper texture, no noise, no gradients. Composition is a strict grid of labeled sections, editorial and premium, inspired by classic brand manual layouts.

HEADER (top 10% of canvas): large thin serif wordmark centered, reading 'MEMORAMA' in warm dark brown (#4A3726), letter-spacing wide, with a tiny subtitle below in small caps reading 'BRAND GUIDELINES — 2026'. A fine horizontal hairline rule in dark brown separates the header from the body.

SECTION 1 — COMPANY LOGO (upper-left, occupying left 55% of canvas between 12% and 38% height): label in small caps 'COMPANY LOGO' in brown (#4A3726) at top-left of the section. Below the label, a stylized decorative peacock mark in deep brown (#4A3726) with colorful fanned tail feathers in the brand palette colors (lime green #8ED320, emerald green #2ECC40, orange #F5A623, magenta #E91E63, blue #3498DB, red #E74C3C), handmade playful shapes, flat vector style, no gradients. To the right of the peacock, a brush-script custom wordmark 'Memorama' in warm brown (#4A3726), organic handwritten strokes, slightly uneven, artisan feel. Directly below the wordmark, a thin all-caps serif tagline 'IDEAS CREATIVAS' in smaller size, wide letter-spacing, same brown.

SECTION 2 — LOGO VARIATIONS (upper-right, occupying right 42% of canvas between 12% and 38% height): label in small caps 'LOGO VARIATIONS'. Three stacked rectangular swatches side by side, each containing the Memorama peacock+wordmark lockup: (a) on cream background with full-color peacock, (b) on deep brown (#4A3726) background with white-outlined peacock and white wordmark, (c) on lime green (#8ED320) background with brown mono peacock. Thin brown hairline borders around each swatch. Tiny caption under each: 'PRIMARY', 'DARK BG', 'COLOR BG'.

SECTION 3 — LOGO CLEARSPACE (middle-left, occupying left 30% between 40% and 60% height): label 'LOGO CLEARSPACE'. Show the Memorama lockup centered inside a dashed brown rectangle that illustrates the safe margin. Four small 'X' markers on the sides, with a tiny note reading 'Min. clearspace = height of M'.

SECTION 4 — TYPOGRAPHY (middle-center, 30% width between 40% and 60% height): label 'TYPOGRAPHY'. Two typographic specimens stacked vertically: first specimen shows the word 'Memorama' in brush-handmade script in brown (#4A3726), labeled below as 'Primary — Brush Script'. Second specimen shows 'IDEAS CREATIVAS' in thin all-caps serif with wide tracking in brown, labeled 'Secondary — Thin Serif'. Tiny alphabet row 'Aa Bb Cc — 1234567890' under each specimen.

SECTION 5 — BRAND PALETTE (middle-right, 38% width between 40% and 60% height): label 'BRAND PALETTE'. Seven flat solid color circles arranged in a tidy row, each about equal size, with the HEX value printed directly below each circle in small mono type in brown. In order left-to-right: brown circle #4A3726 labeled 'BROWN / #4A3726', lime circle #8ED320 labeled 'LIME / #8ED320', green circle #2ECC40 labeled 'GREEN / #2ECC40', orange circle #F5A623 labeled 'ORANGE / #F5A623', magenta circle #E91E63 labeled 'MAGENTA / #E91E63', blue circle #3498DB labeled 'BLUE / #3498DB', red circle #E74C3C labeled 'RED / #E74C3C'. Circles are perfect flat solids, no shadow, no highlight.

SECTION 6 — ICONOGRAPHY (lower-left, 50% width between 62% and 86% height): label 'ICONOGRAPHY STYLE'. A row of six playful organic flat-vector icons in brown line style on cream, each inspired by the peacock feather language: a feather, a needle-and-thread, a t-shirt silhouette, a cap silhouette, a spool of thread, and a stylized eye-of-feather motif. Simple hand-drawn character, 2px even stroke, rounded joints.

SECTION 7 — BUTTON STYLE (lower-right, 42% width between 62% and 86% height): label 'BUTTON STYLE'. Three sample pill-shaped buttons stacked with generous padding: (a) solid brown (#4A3726) button with cream text 'Cotizar ahora', (b) solid lime (#8ED320) button with brown text 'Ver catálogo', (c) outlined brown ghost button with brown text 'Contacto'. Fully rounded corners, large radius, flat, no shadow.

FOOTER (bottom 8% of canvas): thin brown hairline rule, and centered one line of small type reading '@memoramard · (829) 927-3777 · Bordados · Serigrafía · Uniformes · Artículos Promocionales'.

Overall aesthetic: editorial magazine style brand manual page, clean flat vector art, precise alignment, warm cream paper with very subtle fiber texture, zero photographic elements, zero 3D, zero gradients, zero drop shadows. Typography is crisp, perfectly legible, no blurry letters. The peacock illustration is whimsical and artisan, not corporate. Think boutique design studio brand book on a premium cream paper print.

Do not render any human figures, photographs, or 3D objects. Do not add mockups of phones, laptops, or framed posters. Keep everything flat and typographic. Do not invent extra sections beyond the seven described. All hex values must be printed exactly as written above with no typos.
negative_prompt: photography, photographic textures, 3D renders, mockups of devices, phone mockup, laptop mockup, poster frame mockup, human figures, hands, faces, noise grain, heavy texture, gradients, soft blur, drop shadows, dramatic shadows, embossed effects, metallic effects, glitch, watermark signatures, extra sections not requested, misspelled hex values, illegible typography, plastic look, AI beauty filter, stylized realism, airbrushed texture, low contrast washed look, wrong palette colors, product box, bottle, fake awards, stock icon library style, corporate clipart

settings.style: editorial flat vector brand guidelines poster
settings.lighting: flat even print lighting, no shadows
settings.quality: high detail, crisp typography, precise alignment, premium brand book
